steps.t: Stánbalk, the Stone Wall can be found to the south of Thikil-gundu. Dori has asked you to scale Stánbalk, the Stone Wall and scout for nearby foes.
Dori can be found on a hilltop overlooking Stánbalk, the Stone Wall of Thikil-gundu. You have scaled Stánbalk, the Stone Wall, and you have found it e…
Dori can be found atop Stánbalk, the Stone Wall. Dori and Company have made camp atop Stánbalk, the Stone Wall. You should now speak to Dori.
The Grey Wrack lies between Stánbalk, the Stone Wall and Thikil-gundu. Dori has asked you to search the Grey Wrack for signs of Nori and his expeditio…
Ingór, son of Vékun can be found in the Grey Wrack. You have found Ingór, son of Vékun while searching the Grey Wrack, but he appears to be wounded. Y…
Slain dwarves and dwarf-wights can be found throughout the Grey Wrack. Fearing that none of their bodies can be recovered, Ingór, son of Vékun has ask…
Thikil-gundu can be found beyond the Grey Wrack. You have made your way to Thikil-gundu and should now search for some sign of Nori and his expedition…
Nori's axe can be found outside the gates of Thikil-gundu. You have discovered Nori's axe amid a pile of Karazgar's rust. You should collect Nori's ax…
Dori can be found atop Stánbalk, the Stone Wall. You have found Nori's axe amid a pile of Karazgar's rust. You should return to Dori at once.
